bullet_signal: paragraph has a numPr element (not a style name)
decode_note: company / sub-section headers are detected by font size, not by style — see consistency_flags
consistency_flags: Bullets appear under 2 different styles (List Paragraph, Normal) — detect bullets by the numPr element, not by style name.
2 paragraph(s) are larger than body text (11.0pt) but use NO heading style ('Michel Guillon', 'Utiq') — a style-only parser would miss these as structural boundaries.
4 heading-styled paragraph(s) carry a direct font-size override — heading level is not a reliable size proxy.
